allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); const azure=Object.keys\({...p.dependencies,...\(p.devDependencies||{}\)}\).filter\(k=>k.includes\('azure'\)||k.includes\('msal'\)\); console.log\(azure.length?azure:'no azure packages'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'neon' in k.lower\(\) or 'pg' in k.lower\(\) or 'postgres' in k.lower\(\)]")
